mapper.select: select id, product_id, view_amount, order_amount, collect_amount, cart_amount, update_time from cm_product_statistics_trend where product_id = #{productId}
mapper.update: update cm_product_statistics_trend set view_amount = #{trend.viewAmount} where id = #{trend.id}
update cm_product_statistics_trend set order_amount = #{trend.orderAmount} where id = #{trend.id}
